_source: Approximate Transfermarkt total squad market values for the 2025/26 Premier League season, EUR millions. Hand-entered ballpark figures (public Transfermarkt order-of-magnitude), used only as the market-value anchor in the Stage-1 blend — NOT a precise scrape. Relative ordering matters more than absolute values because the blend z-scores them. Mirrors the role of worldcup/data/tm_squad_values.json.
